title: Backend Software Engineer
description: We are seeking a Backend Software Engineer to design, build, and maintain our high-performance APIs and microservices. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver robust cloud-native applications.
responsibilities: Develop scalable APIs and services in Python.
Integrate SQL/NoSQL databases and optimize queries.
Deploy services using AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes.
Write unit and integration tests to ensure quality.

title: Frontend React Developer
description: Join our product design team as a Frontend React Developer. You will translate designs into premium, responsive UI/UX experiences and build clean, maintainable components using React and TypeScript.
responsibilities: Develop responsive and accessible web interfaces.
Optimize web components for maximum performance across devices.
Collaborate with product designers and backend engineers.
Implement robust state management using Redux.

title: AI/ML Engineer
description: We are looking for an AI/ML Engineer to train, evaluate, and deploy advanced machine learning and deep learning models. You will work on NLP, computer vision, and recommender systems.
responsibilities: Design, build, and evaluate machine learning pipelines.
Fine-tune deep learning models (NLP/Vision) for custom datasets.
Collaborate with data engineers to build robust training workflows.
Deploy ML models as APIs in production environments.

title: Data Analyst
description: We are looking for a Data Analyst to transform raw data into actionable business intelligence. You will construct visual dashboards, write advanced SQL queries, and perform statistical analysis.
responsibilities: Query complex databases to pull relevant transactional datasets.
Design and maintain interactive dashboards in Tableau and PowerBI.
Perform exploratory data analysis using Pandas and NumPy.
Communicate analytical insights clearly to non-technical business partners.

title: Cloud DevOps Engineer
description: We are hiring a Cloud DevOps Engineer to design, deploy, and manage our cloud infrastructure, automate deployment pipelines (CI/CD), and ensure the scalability, reliability, and security of our services.
responsibilities: Provision cloud infrastructure securely using Terraform.
Manage containerized microservices via Kubernetes clusters.
Construct robust CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions or Jenkins.
Implement systems monitoring, logging, and alerting services.
